messages.title: Daily Bear Reminder
messages.text:
🐻 TODAY {TODAY} 🐻

Bear 1 @ 15:30 UTC
Bear 2 @ 20:00 UTC

💪 Rally Leaders send FULL march.

👉 Join rallies with 120k troops.

🙋 When JOINING use:
Chenko • Amadeus • Yeonwoo • Amane • Margot • Vivian

messages.title: Trap Rally Rules
messages.text:
🚨 TRAP 1 – NEW RULES 🚨

⚡ ROW 1: Start rally immediately

⚡ REMAINING ROWS: Start rally after 1:30 minutes

🔄 Once your rally returns home, start another one immediately

⭐ Keep only TWO rallies in your Favorites ( Apex, Larry or Ghost )

🔔 JOIN the rally that is at the top of your list first (DON'T SKIP IT)

messages.title: Alliance Brawl — Day 1
messages.text:
📢AB Schedule — Day 1

✅ Trucks 
✅Truegold / dust 
✅ Speedups 
✅ Gather  
✅ Gems / Top-up $
✅ Emblems / Manuscripts

✨ Tip for merchant empire: don’t send escort trucks right at reset, wait until after ~6 UTC. Higher chance to be raided right at reset. When hitting caravans, target AB opponents. Also save assistance for the high value trucks. Make sure to use all 4 attacks for points! 💪

messages.title: Golden Glaives — Monday
messages.text:
🌟 GOLDEN GLAIVES MONDAY! 🌟
🏦 SAVE YOUR SUNDAY INTELS!
——————————————
🕛 00 UTC → ✅ Do / ✅ Collect 💰
🕗 08 UTC → ✅ Do / 🚫 Collect 💰
🕓 16 UTC → 🚫 Do / 🚫 Collect 💰
🕛 00 UTC → ✅ Do / ✅ Collect 💰
——————————————
💡 HOW IT WORKS:
*DO = Complete Intel Missions
*COLLECT = Claim the Intel rewards (💰)
**Hold Pan until after 16 UTC to receive additional Intel Missions.

messages.title: Vikings Event
messages.text:
🛡️ VIKINGS {TODAY} - 20:00 UTC 🛡️

🚶 Try to send ALL Infantry & Cavalry.

💪 Keep 3 strong defense heroes at home.

⚡ Be online for more points.

🏠 Send your location & status (Online / Offline) in the KNG VV chat.

messages.title: Vikings HQ Waves
messages.text:
WAVES 10 & 20
🏰 Send 108K troops to HQ:

🚶 WAVE 10 - Full Inf - 108k INF

🐎 Wave 20 
38k INF / 70k CAV or
48k INF / 60k CAV or
108k INF

⚠R4s may expel from HQ people with fewer troops

messages.title: Terror Reminder
messages.text:
TERROR REMINDER:

Don’t miss out on free rewards.

Turn on your Auto-Join and help others with hunting Terrors! 🙏

messages.title: Alliance Championship Registration
messages.text:
Alliance Championship
Register your troops in the “MIDDLE”

Ratios if using Jaegar:
70% | 29.9999% | 1ea Archer (Remove Jaegers Hero Gear)

Ratios if using Attack Archers:
50% | 20% | 30%

Ratios if using Defense Archer:
60% | 20% | 20%

messages.title: Alliance Championship Heroes
messages.text:
Ideal Heroes for the 70% | 29.9999% | 1ea Archer formation.

Listed in order of preference with most preferred listed first.

Infantry:
Alcar 4+ star / Long Fei 4+ star

Cavalry:
Thrud / Sophia / Margot / Petra

Archer:
Jaeger 3+ star

messages.title: Alliance Championship Reminder
messages.text:
🚨 ALLIANCE CHAMPIONSHIP REMINDER:

Registration ends TODAY {TODAY} at 23:00 UTC

If you use your Pets, City Buffs, and/or Castle Appointments today, make sure you register for the Alliance Championship 🙏

NOTE: DO NOT LEAVE KNG after you register your troops. Otherwise you will have to register again when you return to KNG and will lose your buffs for the competition.

messages.title: Cesares Fury Started
messages.text:
Cesares Fury Event Started Today {TODAY}:

Please focus on accomplishing this right away. If you get stuck call a rally or request help.

Tip: Use Diana to reduce stamina cost and don’t forget to equip her with strong hero gear (she does NOT need to be a 1st slot hero).

messages.title: Battles 1-5
messages.text:
Today - Cesares Fury Battles 1-5

Captains 1 & 2 after 🐻 #1

Captains 3-5 after 🐻 #2

ATTACK RULES:

For the 1st initial attack send 1 Archer and allow everyone to make contact with the Cesare Captains (1-5) before launching your next (full army attacks).

NOTE: DO NOT TELEPORT.

messages.title: Sanctuary Battle
messages.text:
🚨 SANCTUARY BATTLE

~~ Rules 
👎 NO Solo attacks
👎 Don’t TP over
✅ Join the rally
✅ Minimum Troops e.g. 1 - 10k

messages.title: Swordland Registration
messages.text:
🚨 SWORDLAND REGISTRATION

If you are available to participate in Swordland on Sunday {NEXT_SUNDAY}, please send me a private message with your preference:

Legion 2 @ 12:00 UTC
Legion 1 @ 19:00 UTC

⚠ If you can participate in either Legion, please let me know 😊

messages.title: Swordland Registration Reminder
messages.text:
🚨 SWORDLAND REGISTRATION REMINDER:

If you left KNG make sure you are back by 22:00 UTC and DO NOT LEAVE.

If you plan to participate in Swordland this week, verify you are signed up by making sure you have a ✅ next to your name.

If you don't see a checkmark, please contact an R4 immediately 🙏

messages.title: Tri & Swordland Registration
messages.text:

Legion 2 @ 14:00 UTC
Legion 1 @ 19:00 UTC

Legion 1 @ 19:00 UTC
